title: Cozy
description:
The modpack for the CozySMP server on COZY.
Icon by kit_712
body:
# What is CozySMP?
CozySMP is our classic Vanilla+ experience using Fabric! We have many mods and features to help make you feel at home, such as Blockus, Chipped, and a wide variety of custom biomes and blocks! We also have custom-designed origins like Scorch, Dim Kitsune, and Cryogen with many more features and updates always on the way!

<center>

![Truman Show](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ec34e6c91527317cb1be311a221482adbd50a96_0.webp)

</center>

# The Cozy Experience
CozySMP runs on 1.21.1 Fabric. Join the community, make friends, and immerse yourself in a world rich with exploration, creativity, and companionship. CozySMP is the perfect place to unwind and enjoy all the little touches that make Minecraft feel familiar and fresh.

![Cozy SMP players](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/130347dbe59bf30e214397a0c191f8b52ab95b39.png)

CozySMP offers a range of exclusive custom origins, designed specifically for this server by a dedicated development team. Play origins such as [Codec, Dimensional Kitsune, Cryogen](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lunas-origins), and many other custom origins that add unique abilities and traits. Whether you’re seeking something familiar or entirely new.


![Origins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7016a140073be1117f14aaa63d209cca2d3ec49.png)
*Some origins depicted above come from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/apocalypse-origins)*

# How do I join???
Just download the modpack, its that simple. For future updates we recommend joining the Discord Server, but... no matter what you choose to do... you'll **never** escape the **chaos.**
